mdJSONdictio 1.0
  • Get started
  • Reference

mdJSONdictio

Source: vignettes/mdJSONdictio.Rmd
mdJSONdictio.Rmd

Introduction

Anyone who has written metadata in mdEditor knows creating dictionaries can be tedious and repetitive. The R package mdJSONdictio aims to streamline this process. Rather than defining data table attributes in mdEditor, users can fill out a tabular data dictionary template and format it to mdJSON using the function build.mdJSON(). The resultant mdJSON file can be imported in mdEditor to create a Dictionary record with data table attributes already defined.


build.mdJSON()

Transforms a tabular data dictionary into an R list that can be subsequently converted to mdJSON and imported to mdEditor as a Dictionary record. The input data frame must be formatted to a template as described in the Tabular Data Dictionary Template section.

A data dictionary imported as a data frame in R: 
#> # A tibble: 463 × 12
#>     codeName           domainItem_name  domainItem_value definition                                                                                                     dataType          allowNull units           unitsResolution minValue maxValue isCaseSensitive notes
#>     <chr>              <chr>            <chr>            <chr>                                                                                                          <chr>             <chr>     <chr>           <lgl>              <dbl>    <dbl> <chr>           <lgl>
#>   1 SpeciesCode        colname          colname          4-letter American Ornithological Union (AOU) species code of the captured bird                                 character varying no        NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>   2 SpeciesCode        BADE             BADE             Band Destoyed                                                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>   3 SpeciesCode        BALO             BALO             Band Lost                                                                                                      NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>   4 BandNumberIn       colname          colname          The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when captured                                integer           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>   5 BandNumberOut      colname          colname          The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when released                                integer           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>   6 Year               colname          colname          4-number year of capture; YYYY                                                                                 year              yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>   7 Month              colname          colname          1-2-number month of capture; M or MM                                                                           integer           yes       NA              NA                     1       12 NA              NA   
#>   8 Day                colname          colname          1-2-number day of capture; D or DD                                                                             integer           yes       NA              NA                     1       31 NA              NA   
#>   9 Country            colname          colname          Country of capture location                                                                                    character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  10 StateProvince      colname          colname          State or province code of capture location                                                                     character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  11 StateProvince      AK               AK               Alaska, USA                                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  12 StateProvince      WA               WA               Washington, USA                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  13 StateProvince      NWT              NWT              Northwest Territories, Canada                                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  14 StateProvince      MAN              MAN              Manitoba, Canada                                                                                               NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  15 StateProvince      QUE              QUE              Quebec, Canada                                                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  16 City               colname          colname          City or town of capture location                                                                               character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  17 City               Anchorage        Anchorage        Anchorage, Alaska                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  18 City               Yellowknife      Yellowknife      Yellowknife, Northwest Territories, Canada                                                                     NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  19 City               Churchill        Churchill        Churchill, Manitoba, Canada                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  20 City               Nome             Nome             Nome, Alaska                                                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  21 City               Fairbanks        Fairbanks        Fairbanks, Alaska                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  22 City               Tok              Tok              Tok, Alaska                                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  23 Area               colname          colname          Area of capture location; more specific than state or province, though not a city or town                      character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  24 Area               JBER             JBER             Joint-Base Elmendorf Richardson Air Force Base, Anchorage, Alaska                                              NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  25 Area               Eielson          Eielson          Eielson Air Force Base, Alaska                                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  26 Area               Grays Harbor     Grays Harbor     Grays Harbor, Washington                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  27 Area               James Bay        James Bay        James Bay, Canada                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  28 Area               Kanuti NWR       Kanuti NWR       Kanuti National Wildlife Refuge, Alaska                                                                        NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  29 Area               Mingan           Mingan           Mingan, Quebec, Canada                                                                                         NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  30 Area               Cape Krusenstern Cape Krusenstern Cape Krusenstern, Alaska                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  31 Area               Kakagrak Hills   Kakagrak Hills   Kakagrak Hills, Alaska                                                                                         NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  32 Area               Yukon Flats NWR  Yukon Flats NWR  Yukon Flats National Wildlife Refuge, Alaska                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  33 Area               Fort Wainwright  Fort Wainwright  Fort Wainwright Army Base, Fairbanks, Alaska                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  34 Area               Eareckson        Eareckson        Eareckson Air Station, Shemya Island, Alaska                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  35 PlotName           colname          colname          Plot name of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations.csv'          character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  36 PlotID             colname          colname          Plot ID of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations .csv'           character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  37 Latitude_dec       colname          colname          Latitude of capture location in decimal degrees                                                                numeric           yes       decimal degrees NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  38 Longitude_dec      colname          colname          Longitude of capture location in decimal degrees                                                               numeric           yes       decimal degrees NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  39 Easting            colname          colname          Easting of capture location                                                                                    numeric           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  40 Northing           colname          colname          Northing of capture location                                                                                   numeric           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  41 Hem                colname          colname          Hemisphere of capture location                                                                                 character         yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  42 Hem                N                N                Northern                                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  43 Hem                S                S                Southern                                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  44 Zone               colname          colname          State Plane Coordinate System zone of capture location                                                         integer           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  45 BanderID           colname          colname          Code of the bander, or bird handler for recaptures; often first initial, middle initial, and last name         character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  46 ScribeID           colname          colname          Code of the scribe; often first initial, middle initial, and last name                                         character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  47 CaptureTime        colname          colname          Time of bird capture; 24:00                                                                                    time              yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  48 ReleaseTime        colname          colname          Time of bird release; 24:00                                                                                    time              yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  49 BBLDisposition     colname          colname          The BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird    character         yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA yes             NA   
#>  50 BBLDisposition     1                1                New Band                                                                                                       NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  51 BBLDisposition     4                4                Destroyed Band                                                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  52 BBLDisposition     5                5                Replacement Band                                                                                               NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  53 BBLDisposition     6                6                Added Band                                                                                                     NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  54 BBLDisposition     8                8                Band Lost                                                                                                      NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  55 BBLDisposition     9                9                Record Lost                                                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  56 BBLDisposition     F                F                Foreign Recapture                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  57 BBLDisposition     R                R                Recapture                                                                                                      NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  58 BBLDisposition     D                D                Double Band 1st                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  59 BBLDisposition     S                S                Double Band 2nd                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  60 BBLDisposition     X                X                Banding Mortality                                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  61 BBLStatus          colname          colname          The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was released        character varying yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  62 BBLStatus          3--              3--              Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  63 BBLStatus          5--              5--              Sick, Exhausted, Over-stressed, Injured, or with a Physical Deformity                                          NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  64 BBLStatus          300              300              Normal wild bird, Federal numbered metal band only.                                                            NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  65 BBLStatus          301              301              Normal wild bird, Colored leg band(s): plastic, metal, paint, tape.                                            NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  66 BBLStatus          310              310              All flight feathers on one or both wings clipped or pulled plus auxiliary marker(s).                           NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  67 BBLStatus          315              315              Normal wild bird, Mouth swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.                                         NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  68 BBLStatus          317              317              Normal wild bird, Tracheal swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.                                      NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  69 BBLStatus          318              318              Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken                                                                           NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  70 BBLStatus          319              319              Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken, plus auxiliary marker(s).                                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  71 BBLStatus          325              325              Normal wild bird, Two or more types of auxiliary markers.                                                      NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  72 BBLStatus          333              333              Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).                           NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  73 BBLStatus          334              334              Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).                           NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  74 BBLStatus          380              380              Normal wild bird, Satellite/ Cell/ GPS transmitter                                                             NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  75 BBLStatus          381              381              Normal wild bird, Radio transmitter.                                                                           NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  76 BBLStatus          389              389              Normal wild bird, transmitter (use 380/381 when applicable)                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA

#>  78 BBLCondition       colname          colname          The BBL Condition code describing the condition of the captured bird and the federal metal band                integer           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  79 BBLCondition       2                2                Unknown condition of the bird; Band removed                                                                    NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  80 BBLCondition       3                3                Dead; Unknown if band was removed                                                                              NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  81 BBLCondition       4                4                Dead; Band left on bird                                                                                        NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  82 BBLCondition       5                5                Dead; Band removed                                                                                             NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#>  83 BBLCondition       6                6                Alive - Released; Unknown if band was removed                                                                  NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA

#> 316 Mass_g             colname          colname          Mass of captured brid in grams                                                                                 numeric           yes       grams           NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 317 FatScore           colname          colname          Fat score of captured bird (0-7)                                                                               integer           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 318 FatScore           0                0                No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body                                                                 NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 319 FatScore           1                1                Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)                                         NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 320 FatScore           2                2                Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled        NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 321 FatScore           3                3                Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen       NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 322 FatScore           4                4                Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen     NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 323 FatScore           5                5                Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen         NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 324 FatScore           6                6                Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen  NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 325 FatScore           7                7                Very excessive;  fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 326 TotalHead_mm       colname          colname          Length of the head of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to back of head              numeric           yes       millimeters     NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 327 NaresTip_mm        colname          colname          Length from nares to tip of the captured bird in millimeters                                                   numeric           yes       millimeters     NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 328 CulmenLength_mm    colname          colname          Culmen length of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to base of bill                   numeric           yes       millimeters     NA                    NA       NA NA              NA

#> 342 CloacalProtub      0                0                Cloaca not enlarged                                                                                            NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 343 CloacalProtub      1                1                Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 344 CloacalProtub      2                2                Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical                                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA

#> 347 BroodPatch         0                0                Absent                                                                                                         NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 348 BroodPatch         1                1                Not completely defeathered                                                                                     NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 349 BroodPatch         2                2                Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin                                            NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 350 BroodPatch         3                3                Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles     NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 351 BroodPatch         4                4                Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone                                         NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 352 BroodPatch         5                5                Feathering over                                                                                                NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA

#> 368 BodyMolt           colname          colname          Body molt score of the captured bird                                                                           integer           yes       NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 369 BodyMolt           0                0                No body molt                                                                                                   NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 370 BodyMolt           1                1                Trace; Only a very few feathers molting anywhere on the bird’s body in no discernible pattern.                 NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 371 BodyMolt           2                2                Light; Fewer than one-third of the contour feathers on the bird are molting                                    NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 372 BodyMolt           3                3                Medium; From one to two-thirds of a bird’s contour feathers are in molt.                                       NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA   
#> 373 BodyMolt           4                4                Heavy; More than two-thirds of the contour feathers on the bird are in molt.                                   NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA

#> 378 JuvPlumage         3                3                Full juvenal body plumage.                                                                                     NA                NA        NA              NA                    NA       NA NA              NA

#> [1] "{\"dictionaryId\":\"4f3f8ff7-5c87-4087-885b-4218a7050c59\",\"dataDictionary\":{\"citation\":{\"title\":\"Example American Ornithological Union (AOU) species code of the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":false,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"9262772c-12f0-4936-9ff7-7b331f196fcb\"},{\"codeName\":\"BandNumberIn\",\"definition\":\"The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when captured\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BandNumberOut\",\"definition\":\"The 9-digit number on the federal metal band attached to the bird when released\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Year\",\"definition\":\"4-number year of capture; YYYY\",\"dataType\":\"year\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Month\",\"definition\":\"1-2-number month of capture; M or MM\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"minValue\":\"1\",\"maxValue\":\"12\"},{\"codeName\":\"Day\",\"definition\":\"1-2-number day of capture; D or DD\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"minValue\":\"1\",\"maxValue\":\"31\"},{\"codeName\":\"Country\",\"definition\":\"Country of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"StateProvince\",\"definition\":\"State or province code of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"7597f689-6488-4394-a003-85cfa3dede9b\"},{\"codeName\":\"City\",\"definition\":\"City or town of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"ba31f755-0870-49b1-aea8-cb17fa858597\"},{\"codeName\":\"Area\",\"definition\":\"Area of capture location; more specific than state or province, though not a city or town\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"6a5ffd27-6027-4579-82c9-5f30089fcccc\"},{\"codeName\":\"PlotName\",\"definition\":\"Plot name of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations.csv'\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"PlotID\",\"definition\":\"Plot ID of capture location; more specific than LocCity or LocArea; refer to 'Master_Locations .csv'\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Latitude_dec\",\"definition\":\"Latitude of capture location in decimal degrees\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"decimal degrees\"},{\"codeName\":\"Easting\",\"definition\":\"Easting of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Northing\",\"definition\":\"Northing of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Hem\",\"definition\":\"Hemisphere of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"370cb732-1cda-4391-ad2b-31a3f85d0b1e\"},{\"codeName\":\"Zone\",\"definition\":\"State Plane Coordinate System zone of capture location\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BanderID\",\"definition\":\"Code of the bander, or bird handler for recaptures; often first initial, middle initial, and last name\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"ScribeID\",\"definition\":\"Code of the scribe; often first initial, middle initial, and last name\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"CaptureTime\",\"definition\":\"Time of bird capture; 24:00\",\"dataType\":\"time\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"ReleaseTime\",\"definition\":\"Time of bird release; 24:00\",\"dataType\":\"time\",\"allowNull\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BBLDisposition\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"ae21b097-8d6c-4c56-a3a0-57d61274c482\"},{\"codeName\":\"BBLStatus\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was released\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"23e68641-119f-4b3d-971d-efab8666f01b\"},{\"codeName\":\"BBLCondition\",\"definition\":\"The BBL Condition code describing the condition of the captured bird field\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"2de6220d-d118-41fe-a739-3ccd8e45816a\"},{\"codeName\":\"BBLHowAged\",\"definition\":\"The BBL HowAged code describing how the captured bird was aged; multiple methods seperated by ','\",\"dataType\":\"character varying\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"455d2586-0790-4412-839e-b21da78b5466\"},{\"codeName\":\"BBLHowSexed\",\"definition\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the grams\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"grams\"},{\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"definition\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"5008a03f-8002-4c0d-b7e4-4ada1bc920d6\"},{\"codeName\":\"TotalHead_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the head of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to back of head\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"NaresTip_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length from nares to tip of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"CulmenLength_mm\",\"definition\":\"Culmen length of the captured bird in millimeters; measured from tip of bill to base of bill\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"CulmenDepth_mm\",\"definition\":\"Culmen depth of the of the captured brid in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"CulmenWidth_mm\",\"definition\":\"Culmen width of the captured bird in millimeters; measured at the distal end of the nares\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"Tarsus_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the tarsometatarsus on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"Wing_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the folded wing of the captured bird in millimeters.\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"Tail_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of central rectrices on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"Gape_mm\",\"definition\":\"Gape length of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"LongestPrimary_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of longest primary of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"P10_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the primary 10 feather on the captured bird in millimeters; measured from skin to tip of feather\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"P10Exposed_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of the exposed primary 10 feather (out of sheathing) on the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"P1Length_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of primary 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"P1LessCov_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length from primary 1 feather to lesser cover feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"R1Length_mm\",\"definition\":\"Length of rectrix 1 feather of the captured bird in millimeters\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"units\":\"millimeters\"},{\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"definition\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"d0fbc3bb-7745-42e1-b849-ae3288a099e2\"},{\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"definition\":\"Brood patch score of captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"58fb24a0-cf46-43b4-80f3-24b68ebd0c83\"},{\"codeName\":\"BodyCover_dec\",\"definition\":\"Estimated cover of body feathers on the captured bird; percent formatted as a decimal\",\"dataType\":\"numeric\",\"allowNull\":true,\"minValue\":\"0\",\"maxValue\":\"1\"},{\"codeName\":\"FeatherContrast\",\"definition\":\"Whether there is color contrast on the underwing coverts of the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"definition\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"0ff3c279-5e34-4739-8b47-dd2b661a38b5\"},{\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"definition\":\"Body molt score of the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"58e2889b-261a-44c9-a7e4-a110423ee303\"},{\"codeName\":\"JuvPlumage\",\"definition\":\"The presence of juvenal body plumage on captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"6d075770-0f57-4b1c-8741-8eb3f8dfaac4\"},{\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherMolt\",\"definition\":\"Code describing the type of molt occuring in the flight feathers of the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"character\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true,\"domainId\":\"c5bf25f6-fd1b-4fb7-bcfa-5c28e0c8a5e8\"},{\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherWear\",\"definition\":\"The degree of feather wear on the captured bird (0-5)\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"5d31ef61-e000-40ca-9861-004b5b75e452\"},{\"codeName\":\"RectMolt\",\"definition\":\"The presence and characteristics of active rectrix feather molt on the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"0b6aa5f7-e119-466c-87c8-0f5377dce29d\"},{\"codeName\":\"RectWear\",\"definition\":\"The degree of rectrix feather wear on the captured bird\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"692dcca7-41b2-4e00-812a-8f9d59fb26a6\"},{\"codeName\":\"RectShape\",\"definition\":\"Degree of rectrix feather roundness on the captured bird (0-3)\",\"dataType\":\"integer\",\"allowNull\":true,\"domainId\":\"db787e39-7167-4ed8-bf65-480d653367ef\"},{\"codeName\":\"Buccal\",\"definition\":\"Whether a buccal swab sample was collected from captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Fecal\",\"definition\":\"Whether a fecal sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Nails\",\"definition\":\"Whether a nail sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BloodFilter\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood filter sample was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BloodSmear\",\"definition\":\"Whether a blood smear was collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BloodGenetics\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for genetic testing (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BloodIsotope\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for isotope analysis (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"BloodHg\",\"definition\":\"Whether blood was collected from the captured bird for mercury (Hg) bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"Downy\",\"definition\":\"Whether downy feathers were collected from the captured bird (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"FeatherIsotope\",\"definition\":\"Whether a feather sample was collected from the captured bird for isotope analysis (Y/N)\",\"dataType\":\"binary\",\"allowNull\":true,\"isCaseSensitive\":true},{\"codeName\":\"FeatherType\",\"definition\":\"Code identifying type of feather collected from the captured bird; specific feather number provided, if known\",\"dataType\":\"character of capture location\"},{\"domainId\":\"ae21b097-8d6c-4c56-a3a0-57d61274c482\",\"codeName\":\"BBLDisposition\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"New Band\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Destroyed Band\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Replacement Band\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Added Band\"},{\"name\":\"8\",\"value\":\"8\",\"definition\":\"Band Lost\"},{\"name\":\"9\",\"value\":\"9\",\"definition\":\"Record Lost\"},{\"name\":\"F\",\"value\":\"F\",\"definition\":\"Foreign Band 2nd\"},{\"name\":\"X\",\"value\":\"X\",\"definition\":\"Banding Mortality\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL Disposition code describing the disposition of the federal metal band attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"23e68641-119f-4b3d-971d-efab8666f01b\",\"codeName\":\"BBLStatus\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"3--\",\"value\":\"3--\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Banding or trapping mortality\"},{\"name\":\"5--\",\"value\":\"5--\",\"definition\":\"Sick, Exhausted, Over-stressed, Injured, or with a Physical Deformity\"},{\"name\":\"300\",\"value\":\"300\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Federal numbered metal band only.\"},{\"name\":\"301\",\"value\":\"301\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Colored leg band(s): plastic, metal, paint, tape.\"},{\"name\":\"310\",\"value\":\"310\",\"definition\":\"All flight feathers on one or both wings clipped or pulled plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"315\",\"value\":\"315\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Mouth swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"317\",\"value\":\"317\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Tracheal swab, plus one or more auxiliary markers used.\"},{\"name\":\"318\",\"value\":\"318\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken\"},{\"name\":\"319\",\"value\":\"319\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Blood sample taken, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"325\",\"value\":\"325\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Two or more types of auxiliary markers.\"},{\"name\":\"333\",\"value\":\"333\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"334\",\"value\":\"334\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Taken from an artificial nest structure, plus auxiliary marker(s).\"},{\"name\":\"380\",\"value\":\"380\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Satellite/ Cell/ GPS transmitter\"},{\"name\":\"381\",\"value\":\"381\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Radio transmitter.\"},{\"name\":\"389\",\"value\":\"389\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, transmitter (use 380/381 when applicable)\"},{\"name\":\"390\",\"value\":\"390\",\"definition\":\"Normal wild bird, Datalogger (i.e. geolocator)\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL Status code describing the status of the captured bird and what was done before it was bird\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Dead; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Alive - Released; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Alive - Released; Band left on bird\"},{\"name\":\"8\",\"value\":\"8\",\"definition\":\"Alive – Released; Band removed\"},{\"name\":\"9\",\"value\":\"9\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Unknown if band was removed\"},{\"name\":\"10\",\"value\":\"10\",\"definition\":\"Alive - In captivity; Band left on green\"},{\"name\":\"Lg\",\"value\":\"Lg\",\"definition\":\"Light green\"},{\"name\":\"W\",\"value\":\"W\",\"definition\":\"White\"},{\"name\":\"Y\",\"value\":\"Y\",\"definition\":\"Yellow\"}],\"description\":\"Color of plastic, field-readable flag placed on the bird's leg when captured\"},{\"domainId\":\"31f25d0a-4af0-474b-88e6-a3982e68819c\",\"codeName\":\"FlagColorOut\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Dg\",\"value\":\"Dg\",\"definition\":\"Dark green\"},{\"name\":\"Lg\",\"value\":\"Lg\",\"definition\":\"Light green\"},{\"name\":\"W\",\"value\":\"W\",\"definition\":\"White\"},{\"name\":\"Y\",\"value\":\"Y\",\"definition\":\"Yellow\"}],\"description\":\"Color of plastic, field-readable flag placed on the bird's leg when released\"},{\"domainId\":\"d22dd5c5-3626-46da-93d4-cc701fd2256b\",\"codeName\":\"CaptureMethod\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"MN\",\"value\":\"MN\",\"definition\":\"Mist Net\"},{\"name\":\"WT\",\"value\":\"WT\",\"definition\":\"Walk-in Trap\"},{\"name\":\"HA\",\"value\":\"HA\",\"definition\":\"Hand\"},{\"name\":\"BN\",\"value\":\"BN\",\"definition\":\"Bownet\"},{\"name\":\"CN\",\"value\":\"CN\",\"definition\":\"Canon Net\"},{\"name\":\"SN\",\"value\":\"SN\",\"definition\":\"Swoop Net\"},{\"name\":\"WN\",\"value\":\"WN\",\"definition\":\"Whoosh Net\"},{\"name\":\"NG\",\"value\":\"NG\",\"definition\":\"Net Gun\"}],\"description\":\"Method used to capture the bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"bad05f26-d932-4bd0-9583-41478a7f062c\",\"codeName\":\"Age\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"L\",\"value\":\"L\",\"definition\":\"Local (Nestling)\"},{\"name\":\"HY\",\"value\":\"HY\",\"definition\":\"Hatch Year\"},{\"name\":\"AHY\",\"value\":\"AHY\",\"definition\":\"After Hatch Year\"},{\"name\":\"SY\",\"value\":\"SY\",\"definition\":\"Second Year\"},{\"name\":\"ASY\",\"value\":\"ASY\",\"definition\":\"After Second Year\"},{\"name\":\"TY\",\"value\":\"TY\",\"definition\":\"Third Year\"},{\"name\":\"ATY\",\"value\":\"ATY\",\"definition\":\"After Third Year\"},{\"name\":\"U\",\"value\":\"U\",\"definition\":\"Unknown\"}],\"description\":\"Age description of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"2de6220d-d118-41fe-a739-3ccd8e45816a\",\"codeName\":\"Sex\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"M\",\"value\":\"M\",\"definition\":\"Male\"},{\"name\":\"F\",\"value\":\"F\",\"definition\":\"Female\"},{\"name\":\"U\",\"value\":\"U\",\"definition\":\"Unknown\"}],\"description\":\"Code describing the sex of the captured bird as determined in the field\"},{\"domainId\":\"455d2586-0790-4412-839e-b21da78b5466\",\"codeName\":\"BBLHowAged\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"AM\",\"value\":\"AM\",\"definition\":\"Auxiliary marker\"},{\"name\":\"BO\",\"value\":\"BO\",\"definition\":\"Behavioral observation\"},{\"name\":\"BP\",\"value\":\"BP\",\"definition\":\"Brood patch\"},{\"name\":\"BU\",\"value\":\"BU\",\"definition\":\"Bursa of fabricius\"},{\"name\":\"CA\",\"value\":\"CA\",\"definition\":\"Calendar\"},{\"name\":\"CC\",\"value\":\"CC\",\"definition\":\"Combination of characteristics/measurements\"},{\"name\":\"CL\",\"value\":\"CL\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca\"},{\"name\":\"EG\",\"value\":\"EG\",\"definition\":\"Egg in oviduct\"},{\"name\":\"EY\",\"value\":\"EY\",\"definition\":\"Eye color\"},{\"name\":\"FB\",\"value\":\"FB\",\"definition\":\"Fault bar\"},{\"name\":\"FF\",\"value\":\"FF\",\"definition\":\"Flight feathers (remiges), condition or color\"},{\"name\":\"IC\",\"value\":\"IC\",\"definition\":\"Inconclusive, Conflicting\"},{\"name\":\"LP\",\"value\":\"LP\",\"definition\":\"Molt limit present\"},{\"name\":\"MB\",\"value\":\"MB\",\"definition\":\"Mouth/bill\"},{\"name\":\"MR\",\"value\":\"MR\",\"definition\":\"Actively-molting remiges\"},{\"name\":\"NA\",\"value\":\"NA\",\"definition\":\"Not attempted\"},{\"name\":\"NF\",\"value\":\"NF\",\"definition\":\"Nestling recently fledged, incapable of powered flight\"},{\"name\":\"NL\",\"value\":\"NL\",\"definition\":\"No molt Limit\"},{\"name\":\"NN\",\"value\":\"NN\",\"definition\":\"Nestling in nest (altricials), downy young (precocials)\"},{\"name\":\"OT\",\"value\":\"OT\",\"definition\":\"Other\"},{\"name\":\"PC\",\"value\":\"PC\",\"definition\":\"Primary covert wear and/or shape\"},{\"name\":\"PL\",\"value\":\"PL\",\"definition\":\"Body Plumage\"},{\"name\":\"RC\",\"value\":\"RC\",\"definition\":\"Re-captured bird with USGS band\"},{\"name\":\"SK\",\"value\":\"SK\",\"definition\":\"Skull\"},{\"name\":\"TL\",\"value\":\"TL\",\"definition\":\"Tail length\"},{\"name\":\"TS\",\"value\":\"TS\",\"definition\":\"Tail shape or wear\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL HowAged code describing how the captured bird was aged; multiple methods seperated by ','\"},{\"domainId\":\"81f93b32-fb29-4a87-8685-2cc45d8c6ec1\",\"codeName\":\"BBLHowSexed\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"BO\",\"value\":\"BO\",\"definition\":\"Behavioral observation\"},{\"name\":\"BP\",\"value\":\"BP\",\"definition\":\"Brood patch\"},{\"name\":\"CC\",\"value\":\"CC\",\"definition\":\"Combination of characteristics or measurements\"},{\"name\":\"CL\",\"value\":\"CL\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca\"},{\"name\":\"DN\",\"value\":\"DN\",\"definition\":\"DNA/chromosome analysis\"},{\"name\":\"EG\",\"value\":\"EG\",\"definition\":\"Egg in oviduct\"},{\"name\":\"EY\",\"value\":\"EY\",\"definition\":\"Eye color\"},{\"name\":\"FS\",\"value\":\"FS\",\"definition\":\"Feather shape (Primaries or tail)\"},{\"name\":\"IC\",\"value\":\"IC\",\"definition\":\"Inconclusive/conflicting\"},{\"name\":\"LL\",\"value\":\"LL\",\"definition\":\"Laparotomy/laparoscopy\"},{\"name\":\"MB\",\"value\":\"MB\",\"definition\":\"Mouth/bill\"},{\"name\":\"NA\",\"value\":\"NA\",\"definition\":\"Not attempted\"},{\"name\":\"OT\",\"value\":\"OT\",\"definition\":\"Other\"},{\"name\":\"PL\",\"value\":\"PL\",\"definition\":\"Body plumage\"},{\"name\":\"PM\",\"value\":\"PM\",\"definition\":\"Prejuvenile molt\"},{\"name\":\"RC\",\"value\":\"RC\",\"definition\":\"Sexed upon recapture\"},{\"name\":\"SK\",\"value\":\"SK\",\"definition\":\"Skull\"},{\"name\":\"TL\",\"value\":\"TL\",\"definition\":\"Tail length\"},{\"name\":\"WL\",\"value\":\"WL\",\"definition\":\"Wing length\"}],\"description\":\"The BBL HowSexed code describing how the captured bird was sexed; multiple methods seperated by ','\"},{\"domainId\":\"5008a03f-8002-4c0d-b7e4-4ada1bc920d6\",\"codeName\":\"FatScore\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No fat in the furculum or anywhere on the body\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; A very small amount of fat in the furcular hollow (< 5% filled)\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; The bottom of the furculum is completely covered but the furcular hollow is less than 1/3 filled\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Half; The furcular hollow is about half full, and fat is present under the wingpit and/or on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Filled; The furcular hollow is full and a thick layer of fat also occurs under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Bulging; Fat is bulging slightly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"6\",\"value\":\"6\",\"definition\":\"Greatly bulging; Fat is bulging greatly above the furculum and well mounded under the wing and on the abdomen\"},{\"name\":\"7\",\"value\":\"7\",\"definition\":\"Very excessive;  fat pads of the furculum, 'wingpit,' and abdomen are bulging so that they join\"}],\"description\":\"Fat score of captured bird (0-7)\"},{\"domainId\":\"d0fbc3bb-7745-42e1-b849-ae3288a099e2\",\"codeName\":\"CloacalProtub\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Cloaca not enlarged\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Small; Cloaca somewhat enlarged and noticeably swollen and the shape is conical\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Medium; Cloacal protuberance large and the shape is cylindrical\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Large; Cloacal protuberance very large and bulbous\"}],\"description\":\"Cloacal protuberance score on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"58fb24a0-cf46-43b4-80f3-24b68ebd0c83\",\"codeName\":\"BroodPatch\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Absent\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Not completely defeathered\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Well defined, breast muscles and gut still visible through the skin\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Veined and red; the skin is opaque, thickened or engorged, veined and reed with broad, undulating wrinkles\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Wrinkled, the skin has thin wrinkles, engorgement of the skin has gone\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Feathering over\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Present\"}],\"description\":\"Brood patch score of captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"0ff3c279-5e34-4739-8b47-dd2b661a38b5\",\"codeName\":\"MoltLimit\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt limit\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Primaries\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Secondaries\"},{\"name\":\"R\",\"value\":\"R\",\"definition\":\"Rectrices\"},{\"name\":\"C\",\"value\":\"C\",\"definition\":\"Primary upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"U\",\"value\":\"U\",\"definition\":\"Underwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"G\",\"value\":\"G\",\"definition\":\"Greater upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"V\",\"value\":\"V\",\"definition\":\"Primary coverts vs greater coverts\"},{\"name\":\"L\",\"value\":\"L\",\"definition\":\"Lesser upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"M\",\"value\":\"M\",\"definition\":\"Median upperwing coverts\"},{\"name\":\"B\",\"value\":\"B\",\"definition\":\"Body Feathers\"}],\"description\":\"Code indicating the region where molt limits (two generations of feathers) are present on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"58e2889b-261a-44c9-a7e4-a110423ee303\",\"codeName\":\"BodyMolt\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No body molt\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Trace; Only a very few feathers molting anywhere on the bird’s body in no discernible pattern.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light; Fewer than one-third of the contour feathers on the bird are molting\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Medium; From one to two-thirds of a bird’s contour feathers are in molt.\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy; More than two-thirds of the contour feathers on the bird are in molt.\"}],\"description\":\"Body molt score of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"6d075770-0f57-4b1c-8741-8eb3f8dfaac4\",\"codeName\":\"JuvPlumage\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No juvenal body plumage.\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Less than half of the juvenal body plumage remains.\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"More than half of the juvenal body plumage remains, although the bird already has begun its preformative molt.\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Full juvenal body plumage.\"}],\"description\":\"The presence of juvenal body plumage on captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"c5bf25f6-fd1b-4fb7-bcfa-5c28e0c8a5e8\",\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherMolt\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"N\",\"value\":\"N\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Symmetric\"},{\"name\":\"A\",\"value\":\"A\",\"definition\":\"Adventicious\"},{\"name\":\"J\",\"value\":\"J\",\"definition\":\"Juvininle Growth\"}],\"description\":\"Code describing the type of molt occuring in the flight feathers of the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"5d31ef61-e000-40ca-9861-004b5b75e452\",\"codeName\":\"FlightFeatherWear\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Slight\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Moderate\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Excessive\"}],\"description\":\"The degree of feather wear on the captured bird (0-5)\"},{\"domainId\":\"0b6aa5f7-e119-466c-87c8-0f5377dce29d\",\"codeName\":\"RectMolt\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"No molt\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Juvenile molt\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Symmetrical molt\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Adventitious\"}],\"description\":\"The presence and characteristics of active rectrix feather molt on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"692dcca7-41b2-4e00-812a-8f9d59fb26a6\",\"codeName\":\"RectWear\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"None\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Slight\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Light\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Moderate\"},{\"name\":\"4\",\"value\":\"4\",\"definition\":\"Heavy\"},{\"name\":\"5\",\"value\":\"5\",\"definition\":\"Excessive\"}],\"description\":\"The degree of rectrix feather wear on the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"db787e39-7167-4ed8-bf65-480d653367ef\",\"codeName\":\"RectShape\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"0\",\"value\":\"0\",\"definition\":\"Pointed\"},{\"name\":\"1\",\"value\":\"1\",\"definition\":\"Somewhat pointed\"},{\"name\":\"2\",\"value\":\"2\",\"definition\":\"Somewhat rounded\"},{\"name\":\"3\",\"value\":\"3\",\"definition\":\"Rounded\"}],\"description\":\"Degree of rectrix feather roundness on the captured bird (0-3)\"},{\"domainId\":\"8b06b2c6-e76a-4965-8e2b-370662db1e03\",\"codeName\":\"FeatherType\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"PC\",\"value\":\"PC\",\"definition\":\"Primary Covert; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"GC\",\"value\":\"GC\",\"definition\":\"Greater Covert; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"P\",\"value\":\"P\",\"definition\":\"Primary Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"S\",\"value\":\"S\",\"definition\":\"Secondary Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"T\",\"value\":\"T\",\"definition\":\"Tertial Remex; wing flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"R\",\"value\":\"R\",\"definition\":\"Retrix; tail flight feather\"},{\"name\":\"down\",\"value\":\"down\",\"definition\":\"down feather\"},{\"name\":\"contour\",\"value\":\"contour\",\"definition\":\"contour feather\"},{\"name\":\"semiplume\",\"value\":\"semiplume\",\"definition\":\"semiplume feather\"},{\"name\":\"filoplume\",\"value\":\"filoplume\",\"definition\":\"filoplume feather\"},{\"name\":\"body\",\"value\":\"body\",\"definition\":\"unspecified body feather (down, contour, semiplume, or filoplume)\"},{\"name\":\"bristle\",\"value\":\"bristle\",\"definition\":\"bristle feather\"}],\"description\":\"Code identifying type of feather collected from the captured bird; specific feather number provided, if known\"},{\"domainId\":\"8ccdd20d-a02a-4bc9-9b7e-3b94a61b968e\",\"codeName\":\"TagType1\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"},{\"name\":\"GPS\",\"value\":\"GPS\",\"definition\":\"GPS tag\"},{\"name\":\"Radio\",\"value\":\"Radio\",\"definition\":\"Radio tag\"}],\"description\":\"Type of device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"d3c1a634-592b-4b4a-989d-421590d02d93\",\"codeName\":\"TagType2\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Geo\",\"value\":\"Geo\",\"definition\":\"Geolocator tag\"},{\"name\":\"GPS\",\"value\":\"GPS\",\"definition\":\"GPS tag\"},{\"name\":\"Radio\",\"value\":\"Radio\",\"definition\":\"Radio tag\"}],\"description\":\"Type of second device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"9f56e825-b009-45f8-b163-707c70e7d046\",\"codeName\":\"TagStatus1\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Deployed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Removed\",\"value\":\"Removed\",\"definition\":\"Removed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Replaced\",\"value\":\"Replaced\",\"definition\":\"Replaced tag\"},{\"name\":\"Retained\",\"value\":\"Retained\",\"definition\":\"Retained tag\"},{\"name\":\"Lost\",\"value\":\"Lost\",\"definition\":\"Lost tag\"}],\"description\":\"Status of the device attached to the captured bird\"},{\"domainId\":\"63c51131-8ef6-445f-b117-1ae09049d46f\",\"codeName\":\"TagStatus2\",\"domainItem\":[{\"name\":\"Deployed\",\"value\":\"Deployed\",\"definition\":\"Deployed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Removed\",\"value\":\"Removed\",\"definition\":\"Removed tag\"},{\"name\":\"Replaced\",\"value\":\"Replaced\",\"definition\":\"Replaced tag\"},{\"name\":\"Retained\",\"value\":\"Retained\",\"definition\":\"Retained tag\"},{\"name\":\"Lost\",\"value\":\"Lost\",\"definition\":\"Lost tag\"}],\"description\":\"Status of the second device attached to the captured bird\"}]}}"
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$attributes$`date-updated`
#> [1] "2022-03-22T19:01:00.000Z"
#> 
#> 
#> $data[[1]]$type
#> [1] "dictionaries"


Intented Use

build.mdJSON() is intended for anyone who writes mdEditor metadata. It is important to note this function is meant to initiate mdEditor Dictionary records, not update them, which should be done manually in the mdEditor web application. It is recommended users maintain the tabular data dictionary as a human-readable reference for associated data product(s).

Next steps in mdEditor

1. Import the mdJSON file to mdEditor

Open mdEditor in your browser and navigate to the Import tab at the top of the page. Drag and drop the newly written mdJSON file and click “Import Data.” This will generate a Dictionary record with the dictionary title you specified in the function. You may need to refresh your browser if the dictionary does not immediately appear

2. Fix errors in the Dictionary record

When viewing your Dictionary record, you will notice an orange exclamation mark next to the title that indicates the dictionary is incomplete and has missing or erroneous elements. Click the orange exclamation mark to view the details. These errors can be remedied by completing the Responsible Party field in the Main tab and the Entity Code Name and Definition fields in the Entities tab. For more information about these fields, refer to the mdEditor User Manual. You will know your dictionary is free of errors when the orange triangle disappears and the edit icon next to your Dictionary record in the left-hand menu is green. If you see more than these three errors, make sure the tabular data dictionary is filled out as described in the Tabular Data Dictionary Template section.

3. Associate and maintain the Dictionary record

Once the Dictionary record is free of errors, it can be associated with the Metadata record(s) it describes (e.g. tabular dataset, shapefiles) to help create archival quality project metadata. For details of this process and other information, refer to the mdEditor User Manual.Any future updates to your Dictionary record can be done manually in the mdEditor web application.


Tabular Data Dictionary Template

build.mdJSON() only reads data frames formatted to a data dictionary template (Figure 1.1), which can be downloaded here. While csv is a more flexible file format, this template is in xlsx format because it contains validation rules that prevent incorrect values from being entered, resulting in errors when using build.mdJSON() or creating the Dictionary record in mdEditor.

Figure 1.1: Data dictionary template in Excel.



The two main components of the tabular data dictionary template are attributes and entry values, each of which are represented as a row. It is important to remember that while entry values are associated with a certain attribute, not all attributes have defined entry values. For example, the attribute “Sex” may have three defined entry values (“F”,“M”, and “U”), where as the attribute “Year” does not have defined entry values since an unlimited number of years can be entered.

Table 1.1 describes the header in the tabular data dictionary template, which represent field(s) in mdEditor Dictionary records. “Definition” describes the template column. Many of these definitions are derived from the mdEditor User Manual. “DataType” indicates the type of value allowed in the template column. “Required” indicates whether the template column is required by attributes and/or entry values (“No” indicates it is not required by either attributes or entry values).

Note:

  • The template columns “codeName,” “domainItem_name,” “domainItem_value,” and “definition” are all required by attributes and entry values.
  • The template columns “dataType” and “allowNull” are required by attributes

Tip: View attribute rows by filtering the dictionary column “domainItem_name” to “colname” and verify all rows have values for dictionary columns “dataType” and “allowNull”.

Table 1.1: Column descriptions for the data dictionary template.
Column DataType Definition Required
codeName character varying Attribute name; the code used to identify this attribute; most often this will be the table or spreadsheet column name. Attributes; Entry values
domainItem_name character varying A descriptive name associated with the Domain Item value; Default is to use the Domain Item Value; Colum name rows are ‘colname’ Attributes; Entry values
domainItem_value character varying The Domain Item value; the value in the table; colum name rows are ‘colname’ Attributes; Entry values
definition character varying A succinct but comprehensive definition for the attribute or Domain Item Attributes; Entry values
dataType character varying The datatype or format of the entry values for an attribute; choose from drop down Attributes
allowNull binary Indicates whether null values are permitted as the attribute value (yes/no) Attributes
units character varying A unit-of-measure for the attribute. E.g. ‘meters’, ‘atmospheres’, ‘liters’; Unrestricted, though SI units are recommended; lowercase only No
unitsResolution decimal The smallest unit increment to which an attribute value is measured. No
minValue character varying The minimum range value permissible for this attribute. The minimum value may be either numeric or character. No
maxValue character varying The maximum range value permissible for this attribute. The maximum value may be either numeric or character. No
isCaseSensitive binary Indicates if the content of the data set is encoded in case-sensitive ASCII (yes/no) No
notes character varying Anything entered here will be excluded from the JSON dictionary No



“dataType” is the only dictionary column with defined entry values. These are derived from the mdEditor web application. The definitions in Table 1.2 were acquired from the mdCodes Viewer in the mdTools interface.

Table 1.2: dataType entry value descriptions for the data dictionary template.
Value Definition
character fixed length character strings
character varying Variable length character strings
character large object Character large object
national character Fixed length national character strings (2 byte unicode)
national character varying Variable length national character strings (2 byte unicode)
national character large object National character (2 byte unicode) large object
text Variable string to maximum of 65k characters
tinytext Variable string to maximum of 255 characters
mediumtext Variable string to maximum of 16m characters
longtext Variable string to maximum of 4g characters
binary Fixed length binary
binary varying Variable length binary
binary large object Binary large object to maximum of 65k bytes
mediumblob Binary large object to maximum of 16m bytes
longblob Binary large object to maximum of 4g bytes
integer Integers number (+-2b)
tinyint Integer numbers (+-128)
mediumint Integer numbers (+-16k)
smallint Integer numbers (+-32k)
bigint Integer numbers (+-1e27)
float Floating point numbers
real Low precision floating point numbers
double precision High precision floating point numbers
numeric Fixed precision and scale decimal numbers
decimal Fixed precision and scale decimal numbers (numeric alternate)
bit Fixed length bit strings
bit varying Variable length bit strings
date Calendar date
time Clock time
datetime Date and time
timestamp Number of seconds since the unix epoch (1970-01-01t00:00:00 utc)
year Year
interval Time intervals
interval day Day intervals
interval year Year intervals
currency Monetary value
money Monetary value
boolean Boolean value (yes/no)
xml Xml formatted data
enum List of possible values: enum(‘a’,‘b’,‘c’)
